notes.title: Home Screen Widgets
notes.body: New widgets for your home screen: dhikr counter, next dhikr, weekly streak, articles, and a Control Center widget (iOS 18+).

notes.title: Spotlight Search
notes.body: Search for adhkar, articles, and hadiths right from Spotlight.

notes.title: VoiceOver Support
notes.body: Improved VoiceOver accessibility with localized spoken labels across the app.

notes.title: Reading Experience
notes.body: Go to Unread button, auto-scroll to first unread zikr, and per-category page indicators.

notes.title: Dark & Tinted App Icons
notes.body: New dark and tinted variants for app icons.

notes.title: Tatar Language
notes.body: Added Tatar language support.

notes.title: Transliteration Fix
notes.body: Fixed selection of transliteration for Kazakh, Uzbek and other languages using the DIN 31635 standard.

notes.title: Typo Corrections
notes.body: Corrected typos in various adhkar texts.

notes.title: Improved Storage
notes.body: Enhanced file storage for faster and more stable loading of articles, fonts, and background images.

notes.title: Share Updates
notes.body: Updated the Share Dhikr section with new fonts and backgrounds.

notes.title: iOS 26 Support
notes.body: Improved support for iOS 26.

notes.title: Completion Checkmark Fix
notes.body: Fixed the display of the checkmark indicating completion of reading a category.

notes.title: Dua Typo Corrections
notes.body: Corrected typos in the section 100 Duas from the Quran and Sunnah.

notes.title: 100 Duas Collection
notes.body: 100 Duas from the Quran and Sunnah available as a separate category.

notes.title: Updated Color Scheme
notes.body: Updated default color scheme for a refreshed appearance.

notes.title: New Icons
notes.body: New icons throughout the app.

notes.title: Lock Screen Widget
notes.body: Track your daily reading progress directly from your iOS lock screen with a custom widget.

notes.title: Enhanced Sharing
notes.body: Enhanced sharing capabilities for dhikr content.

notes.title: Transliteration Settings
notes.body: Customizable transliteration settings with DIN 31635 romanization support.

notes.title: Counter Improvements
notes.body: Counter behaviour improvements for more reliable tracking.

notes.title: Bug Fixes
notes.body: Various bug fixes for improved stability.
